sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: When you use our website or submit a booking request, we may collect your name, email address, phone number, booking dates, guest count, special requests, device and browser information, and how you found us.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your data solely to process and confirm your reservation enquiry, communicate booking details and updates, improve our website experience, and send occasional newsletters if you have opted in.

sections.heading: 3. Data Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data. We may share it with trusted third-party services (e.g. booking platforms) strictly to fulfil your reservation.

sections.heading: 4. Cookies
sections.content: Our website uses cookies to remember your preferences and analyse site traffic. You may disable cookies in your browser settings; however, some features may not function correctly.

sections.heading: 5. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes outlined above, or as required by law. You may request deletion at any time.

sections.heading: 6. Your Rights
sections.content: Under applicable data protection law you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at hello@seazen.com.
